data.title: Onity Group Reports Strong Q1 2025 Performance
data.description:
Onity Group ( (ONIT) ) has issued an announcement.

On March 20, 2025, Onity Group Inc. hosted an investor presentation at the Sidoti March Virtual Investor Conference, where they provided a preliminary update on their financial and operating performance for the first quarter of 2025. The company reported a significant increase in originations volume compared to the first quarter of 2024, driven by their Correspondent and Co-Issue channels. Additionally, Onity launched an improved closed-end second originations product in February 2025, which has been well received by borrowers. The company also made progress in servicing growth, completing bulk MSR purchases, and adding new subservicing clients. Effective hedging strategies have contributed to consistent net income and GAAP ROE results, and there is potential for releasing some or all of the valuation allowance against its $180 million net U.S. deferred tax asset by year-end 2025.

More about Onity Group

YTD Price Performance: 2.13%

Average Trading Volume: 44,787

Technical Sentiment Consensus Rating: Sell

Current Market Cap: $237.7M

data.title: ValueMax Group Raises S$48.29 Million Through Digital Securities
data.description:
ValueMax Group Ltd. ( (SG:T6I) ) just unveiled an update.

ValueMax Group Ltd. has successfully closed its 3-month Series 008 digital securities issuance on the SDAX Platform, raising S$48.29 million. The issuance received strong investor demand, with notable participation from Ms. Yeah Lee Ching, an Executive Director of the company. This successful fundraising effort highlights the company’s strategic use of digital platforms to enhance its market positioning and attract investment.

More about ValueMax Group Ltd.

ValueMax Group Ltd. operates in the financial services industry, focusing on digital securities and commercial paper offerings. The company engages in raising capital through innovative financial platforms such as the SDAX Platform, targeting investors interested in short-term securities.

data.title: Nuformix plc AGM Resolutions Passed with Strong Shareholder Support
data.description:
Nuformix Plc ( (GB:NFX) ) has shared an announcement.

Nuformix plc announced that all resolutions proposed at its Annual General Meeting were passed, indicating strong shareholder support for the company’s current strategies and leadership. This outcome reinforces the company’s operational stability and strategic direction in the pharmaceutical industry, potentially enhancing its market position and stakeholder confidence.

More about Nuformix Plc

Nuformix is a pharmaceutical development company focusing on addressing unmet medical needs in fibrosis and oncology through drug repurposing. The company specializes in discovering, developing, and patenting novel drug forms with improved physical properties to create new products that are differentiated from the original in terms of dosage, delivery route, or presentation, offering new commercial opportunities. Nuformix has a pipeline of preclinical assets with potential for significant value and early licensing opportunities.

data.title: Zengame Technology Announces Final Dividend for 2024
data.description:
Zengame Technology Holding Ltd. ( (HK:2660) ) just unveiled an update.

Zengame Technology Holding Limited has announced a final ordinary cash dividend of HKD 0.15 per share for the financial year ending December 31, 2024. The dividend will be paid on July 9, 2025, following shareholder approval on June 5, 2025. The ex-dividend date is set for June 10, 2025, with a book closure period from June 12 to June 16, 2025. This announcement reflects the company’s commitment to returning value to its shareholders and may influence investor sentiment and market positioning.

data.title: Andfjord Salmon Raises NOK 600 Million in Successful Share Placement
data.description:
Andfjord Salmon AS ( (DE:50R) ) just unveiled an announcement.

Andfjord Salmon successfully completed a private placement of 17,142,858 new shares at NOK 35 per share, raising approximately NOK 600 million. This capital increase, now registered with the Norwegian Register of Business Enterprises, enhances the company’s financial position, potentially strengthening its market presence and operational capabilities in sustainable aquaculture.

More about Andfjord Salmon AS

Located at Andøya on the Arctic Archipelago of Vesterålen, Norway, Andfjord Salmon is developing the world’s most sustainable and fish-friendly aquaculture facility. The company utilizes a proprietary flow-through system that merges ocean and land-based salmon farming techniques, achieving high survival rates and efficiency in its production cycles.

data.title: LPA Group plc Successfully Passes All Resolutions at AGM
data.description:
LPA Group plc ( (GB:LPA) ) has provided an update.

LPA Group plc announced that all resolutions were passed at its Annual General Meeting held on March 19, 2025. This outcome reflects the company’s stable governance and strategic direction, potentially reinforcing stakeholder confidence and supporting its position in the competitive engineering sector.

More about LPA Group plc

LPA Group plc is an innovation-led engineering specialist focused on electronic and electro-mechanical components and systems. The company serves the transport, aerospace, defense, infrastructure, and industrial markets, providing solutions that enhance product reliability and reduce maintenance and life cycle costs. LPA operates four sites across the UK, with three dedicated to design and manufacturing and one to value-added distribution.

data.title: Caesars Entertainment Enhances Board with Icahn Agreement
data.description:
Caesars Entertainment ( (CZR) ) has provided an update.

On March 17, 2025, Caesars Entertainment entered into an agreement with the Icahn Group, resulting in the appointment of Jesse Lynn and Ted Papapostolou as independent directors on its Board. This strategic move, effective immediately, aims to enhance shareholder value and explore strategic alternatives for Caesars’ digital business, while expanding the Board to 12 members. The agreement includes standstill and voting commitments from the Icahn Group, preventing them from acquiring significant ownership or engaging in proxy contests during the standstill period. This development reflects Caesars’ ongoing efforts to strengthen its governance and maximize shareholder value.

More about Caesars Entertainment

Caesars Entertainment, Inc. is the largest casino-entertainment company in the US and a leading global provider of diversified casino-entertainment services. The company operates resorts primarily under the Caesars®, Harrah’s®, Horseshoe®, and Eldorado® brand names, offering gaming, entertainment, hospitality amenities, and online gaming and sports betting experiences. Caesars focuses on delivering value through exceptional service, operational excellence, and technology leadership, supported by its Caesars Rewards loyalty program.

Technical Sentiment Consensus Rating: Buy

Current Market Cap: $5.84B
